title: DocumentParseResult
description: Canonical result.json format for openKMS document parse pipelines (paddleocr-doc-parse, baidu-doc-parse, etc.). Stored at S3 {file_hash}/result.json and synced to the backend parsing_result field.

file_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the uploaded original file bytes.

parsing_res_list.description: Flattened reading-order blocks across all pages.

layout_det_res.description: Per-page layout detection and page preview references.

markdown.description: Full document markdown (also written to markdown.md).

page_count.description: Number of pages in the parsed document.

width.description: Reference page width in pixels (first page or document default).

height.description: Reference page height in pixels (first page or document default).

baidu_file_id.description: Vendor-specific file id when parsed via Baidu Cloud.

baidu_file_name.description: Vendor-reported source filename when parsed via Baidu Cloud.

BBox.description: Axis-aligned box as [x1, y1, x2, y2] in page coordinates.

Coordinate.description: Layout detector box as [x1, y1, x2, y2] (PaddleOCR-VL layout_det).

label.description: Block type (e.g. doc_title, paragraph_title, text, table, figure, footer).

content.description: Text or HTML/table markup for the block.

image_path.description: Storage-relative path to a cropped block image, usually {file_hash}/block_N.png.

block_index.description: Index into parsing_res_list when annotated by the parser.

input_img.description: Storage-relative path to the full-page preview PNG, e.g. {file_hash}/layout_det_0_input_img_0.png.

text.description: Plain text extracted for the page (Baidu pipeline).
